summary: Full E2E testing of anticiper.net vitrine MVP. 9/9 backend pytest tests passed. All 7 pages render, navbar/mobile burger/language toggle/contact form all work end-to-end. Contact submission stored in MongoDB and success message shown even with empty RESEND_API_KEY (expected behaviour).

issues: Success and error message blocks appear to be rendered side-by-side or near submit button; cosmetic only, functionality intact.

action_items: None blocking. Optional: the `subject` field in Contact.jsx is a <select>; this is fine — just noting so future UI tests use select_option() not fill().

Optional: logger in server.py is defined at module bottom AFTER it is used inside create_contact; if Resend call fails before logger is initialised at import time there would be a NameError. In practice logger binding exists due to module-level reference evaluated lazily inside the function, so not a runtime bug — but moving `logging.basicConfig`+`logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above the route definitions is cleaner.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is defined at the bottom of the file but referenced inside `create_contact` (line 127). It works because the function body executes after module load, but convention-wise declare logger near the top.
server.py: uses deprecated `@app.on_event('shutdown')` — consider FastAPI lifespan context managers.
Contact.jsx subject field is a non-required <select> (good UX). All inputs have proper data-testid.
Backend correctly excludes Mongo `_id` via projection `{_id:0}` in list endpoint.
EmailStr validation + Pydantic length constraints enforce 422 on invalid inputs (confirmed by tests).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Contact submissions created with TEST_ prefix during pytest runs (not cleaned up; safe to leave as this is a fresh MVP).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is read from /app/frontend/.env as fallback. Remember: Contact.jsx subject is a SELECT, use select_option(). RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty — email_sent stays False in DB.
tested_flows: POST /api/contact valid full payload -> 200 {id, status:received, created_at}
GET /api/contact -> list, no _id leaked, persisted record found
Mobile burger opens + closes mobile-menu at 390x844 viewport
